headline: Foreign Worker Levy Generates RM8.5 Billion Government Revenue
context: Foreign worker levy generated RM8.5 billion in 2025 from 2.2 million documented workers across all sectors.

cards.big: Foreign worker levy generated RM8.5 billion from 2.2 million workers
cards.sub: System criticized for treating workers as revenue source not labour force

cards.big: Rates range from RM1,850 to RM4,500 annually by sector and nationality
cards.sub: Manufacturing and plantation pay lowest while service sector pays highest

cards.big: 58% of levy cost passed to workers through salary deductions despite rules
cards.sub: Labour Department found 12,000 violations but compounded only 2,800

cards.big: Estimated 1.5 million undocumented workers pay no levy at all
cards.sub: Underground workforce costs RM5.8 billion in lost levy revenue annually

cards.big: Worker levies test whether labour migration policy prioritizes revenue or worker welfare
RM8.5 billion foreign worker levy revenue. Dependence on levy income creates a perverse incentive against reform.
